__warnings.note: Phase names are pedagogical metaphors. Reviewer free to suggest more natural Ndebele equivalents.
Used 'AMASIKO' (customs) — the Ndebele equivalent of the Shona 'TSIKA' label, uppercased for emphasis.
'Let's learn' → 'Asifunde'. Reviewer: confirm the conjugation reads as inclusive (us-together) not 'I'.
'Hamba kuhle →' is the Ndebele signoff (means 'Go well').
'✓ Correct!' → '✓ Kulungile!'. Could also be 'Yiqiniso!' — pick the one that feels most encouraging.
'Type your answer' — used 'Bhala impendulo yakho'. Idiomatic.
'Tap words below to build the sentence' — long instruction. Translation conveys the same meaning.
Course-hub category labels. 'Izindimi' (languages), 'Izifundo ze-AI', 'Zazi Wena Uqobo' (Know Yourself). Reviewer: confirm these read as category names.
Reviewer: check noun-class agreement — 'esinye isifundo' (class 7 — should match isifundo).
Coming-soon copy. 'Sizalazisa' = 'we will let you know'. Reviewer: confirm tone matches the playful chameleon brand.

tab.coming_soon_sub: Sakha izifundo khathesi. Buyela esikhathini esifitshane!

buy.know_yourself_course: + Thenga esinye isifundo se-Zazi Wena Uqobo

empty_category.ai_courses_body: Isifundo sokuqala sizaqalisa esikhathini esifitshane. Sizalazisa nxa sesilungile.
empty_category.know_yourself_body: Isifundo sokuqala sizaqalisa esikhathini esifitshane. Sizalazisa nxa sesilungile.

locked.subscription_body: Amamoduli ayi-5–10 ngawe-Text AI tier nangaphezulu. Khulisa ukuze uqhubeke loRwen.
locked.course_body: Isifundo lesi ngesohlobo ongakavuli. Khulisa uhlobo ku-account yakho ukuze uqalise.

phase8.unlocked_body: Zama '{{topic}}' kungxoxo. URwen uzasebenzisa lokho okufundileyo.
phase8.locked_body: Yenza ingxoxo yemizuzu eyi-2 nge-'{{topic}}'. URwen uzasebenzisa lokho okufundileyo.

build_sentence.placeholder: Cindezela amagama angaphansi ukuze wakhe umutsho
